image:image.image:title: Fyzenor File Manager Logo
image:image.image:caption: The logo of Fyzenor - The modern C++ terminal file manager.

image:image.image:title: Fyzenor Main Interface Layout
image:image.image:caption: Main browser layout of Fyzenor displaying directories and metadata.

image:image.image:title: Fyzenor Fuzzy Finder Window
image:image.image:caption: Fuzzy finding files and directories overlay screen.

image:image.image:title: Fyzenor Async Task Manager
image:image.image:caption: Asynchronous copy, paste, delete, and zip task manager status.

image:image.image:title: Fyzenor Block Mount Overlay
image:image.image:caption: Block drive and Android MTP device mounting manager.

image:image.image:title: Fyzenor Theme Customizer Configuration
image:image.image:caption: Custom Matugen-themed colors.fz configuration file preview.
